purpose: Reference for the two project-level artifacts Synapse uses: the CLAUDE.md project convention file and the .synapse/ metadata directory. Covers CLAUDE.md purpose/structure/quality guidance/creation methods (!scaffold, !initialize, manual), the .synapse/ directory contents (config.json with monorepo support, toc.md, knowledge/), version control recommendations, project _commands/ resolution hierarchy, context gathering priorities, and CLAUDE.md's impact on swarm quality.
gotchas: Synapse NEVER overwrites existing CLAUDE.md (use --force to override)
CLAUDE.md should be committed; .synapse/ should be gitignored
.synapse/ contains absolute paths -- machine-local, not portable
Project _commands/ have lowest priority -- cannot override built-in Synapse commands
Monorepo field is explicit null (not omitted) for non-monorepo projects
patterns: Specificity over vagueness: 'TypeScript 5.x with strict mode, no any' vs 'we use TypeScript'
Patterns over descriptions: explain how to create new code, not just what exists
Idempotent !initialize: skips existing files, never overwrites
Eight-priority context gathering: glob/grep first, parallel reads, targeted ranges
conventions: Recommended CLAUDE.md sections: Tech Stack, Architecture, File Structure, Conventions, Commands, Environment
Monorepo detection types: npm_workspaces, pnpm, lerna, nx, turbo, cargo, go
